name: ExtensionNutritionOrder_Supplement_Schedule_AsNeededFor
title: R5: Take 'as needed' for x (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule.asNeededFor` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule.asNeededFor` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule.asNeededFor` 0..1 `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule.asNeededFor` has a context of NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `NutritionOrder`.
Element `NutritionOrder.supplement.schedule.asNeededFor` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:

element.definition: Indicates whether the supplement is only taken based on a precondition for taking the supplement.
